title: Soul Speed FOV Fix
description: This mod removes any changes to FOV when using the soul speed enchantment on soul sand/soil.
body:
Sick of how wide your FOV gets when on soul sand? Me too. But I couldn't find a mod to remove it, so I made one!
This mod is designed to disable Minecraft's default FOV changes when walking/sprinting when using the soul speed enchantment on soul sand/soil.


## Upcoming Versions:
- NeoForge?
- Forge 1.21.8+
## Mod Commands (Currently only supported Fabric 1.21.8+):
**/soulspeedfov toggle**

Toggles the FOV fix on or off.

**/soulspeedfov icon toggle**

Toggles the HUD icon on or off.

**/soulspeedfov icon position <position>**

Sets the icon's position on the screen.
Available positions: top_left, top_middle, top_right, bottom_left, bottom_right.

Added icon indicating when soul speed is in effect. USE "/soulspeedfov icon toggle" COMMAND TO DISABLE IT.
